================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 D3 A8 35 47 1E
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1875
Reflected CC   : 0x14
RetType        : 0x03
RetCode        : -5
RetValSize     : 1

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1875
ReflectedCC  : 0x14
PayloadLen   : 1

[EPS] Query payload header decode failed

[PAYLOAD HEX]
01 

[RETURN VALUE]
01 

[BINARY DATA]
